name: desk-calendar
description: Windows Desktop Transparent Calendar - 桌面透明日历

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-icon.js && electron-packager . DeskCalendar --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --asar --icon=icon.ico --app-version=1.0.1 && node scripts/cleanup.js

author: DeskCalendar
